en_title: GTA 6 Scalpers Are Finding Buyers on eBay Despite Rockstar's Commitment to a Digital Release
cn_title: GTA6黄牛eBay叫卖，无视Rockstar数字版承诺
subtitle: 黄牛狂喜
opus_summary: GTA6全面开启预购后，eBay黄牛高价倒卖预购码，标准版80美元(约合人民币544元)被炒至约90美元(约合人民币612元)。

paragraphs.en: Rockstar Games fans seem to be paying eBay scalpers extra for pre-order copies of GTA 6 – even if there isn't much of a reason to.
paragraphs.cn: Rockstar粉丝似乎甘愿多花钱在eBay黄牛手里买GTA6预购，哪怕理由并不充分。

paragraphs.en: Listings for pricier versions of Rockstar's new Grand Theft Auto game have already started popping up on the auction website after pre-orders went live for all on June 25. While the retail price for the standard edition is currently locked in at $80, some scalpers have managed to successfully flip their pre-ordered copy for around $90 , with some going for even more .
paragraphs.cn: 6月25日全面开启预购后，这款《侠盗猎车手》新作的加价转卖便已出现在eBay上。标准版零售价目前锁定在80美元(约合人民币544元)，一些黄牛成功以约90美元(约合人民币612元)转手，有的甚至更高。

paragraphs.en: It's something that usually wouldn't come as much of a surprise in the gaming space, especially considering this particular release is one fans have anticipated for more than 13 years. What many already know, however, is that there isn't actually anything stopping players from pre-ordering GTA 6 without an inflated price.
paragraphs.cn: 在游戏圈里，这通常不算意外，尤其考虑到本作是粉丝期盼了超过13年的大作。然而，很多人知道，玩家其实完全无需支付高价就能预购GTA6。

paragraphs.en: Much to the dismay of physical game collectors everywhere, GTA 6 will only be available as a digital title after Rockstar announced it was ditching discs for its November launch. For those who just need to have that box in hand come this fall, you can still purchase a physical edition, which only comes with a download code inside its case.
paragraphs.cn: 令全球实体游戏收藏家失望的是，Rockstar宣布GTA6在11月发售时将取消光盘，仅提供数字版。如果今秋你非要把盒子拿到手，仍可购买实体版，不过盒子里只有一个下载码。

paragraphs.en: That effectively means players won't have to deal with stock shortages since all versions of the game will be available digitally anyway. Even supply for the physical box seems to be holding up, too, as major retailers like Amazon, Best Buy, and Target suggest fans can check out their online marketplaces to pre-order code-in-box copies at the time of this story's publication. For some reason, players – and scalpers – are still heading to eBay.
paragraphs.cn: 这实际上意味着玩家不必担心缺货，因为游戏全版本都将以数字形式提供。实体包装盒的供应似乎也充足，亚马逊、百思买、塔吉特等主要零售商在本文发稿时仍可在线预购含下载码的实体版。但不知为何，玩家——以及黄牛——还是往eBay跑。

paragraphs.en: Interestingly, these eBay listings seem to include both physical boxes and digital copies of the game, with some sellers pointing out that those who buy the latter will not need to pay any shipping fees when the launch arrives. Those purchasing physical copies via this method will also be subject to delivery fees on top of the already steeper price they're paying.
paragraphs.cn: 有意思的是，eBay上的这些清单似乎同时包括实体盒和数字版，一些卖家指出，购买后者在发售时将省去运费。通过这种方式购买实体版的买家则要在本就更高的价格上再支付配送费。

paragraphs.en: Whether you're buying directly from Rockstar or purchasing a copy for a little extra on eBay for…some reason, GTA 6 has a release date of November 19, 2026, for PS5 and Xbox Series X | S. Meanwhile, a new report has claimed that Rockstar has . For more on scalpers, you can see how some are trying to flip Valve's new Steam Machine .
paragraphs.cn: 无论你是直接从Rockstar购买，还是出于某种原因在eBay上多花点钱，GTA6都将于2026年11月19日登陆PS5和XBOX Series。与此同时，一则新报道声称Rockstar已经。欲了解更多黄牛消息，可看有些人如何倒卖Valve新款Steam Machine。
